review_title: TrueRanker lives up to its name and is the best SEO tool I use.
description: My experience with TrueRanker has been excellent. I have been using it for 2+ years now and when I work on my rankings the tool comes through and it is easier to decide on what to write about on our blog. And while it is a powerful toolset, the UI is very intuitive and simple to use.
author: David T.
pros: I like the accuracy of the rank tracking, I like the extra SEO tools that they have built out, I like how easy it is to use as the UI is very intuitive, and I like the value.
cons: I dont have any cons to list for TrueRanker. I hate it when a term I want to rank for is below the top 100, but that is on me not on them.

description: Overall I'm happy with it! It's affordable, and it does what a rank tracker is supposed to do!
author: Gaia B.
pros: TrueRanker is incredibly easy to use. Anyone with a bit of knowledge of SEO can deploy it in seconds. They are constantly improving it, and if there are minor bugs, they try to solve those as soon as possible. The feature I like the most is their sharable reports. Those let me share multiple reports with different clients, managing everything from a single dashboard. It leveled up my SEO game and my freelancer services. The team behind the product is excellent.
cons: One potential issue is that it can be challenging to know whether your ranks are accurate since the system does not provide detailed feedback about how it works (they once had a bug that showed a lower ranking as the actual ranking). They have an Android app, but they don't have an iOS app, which isn't very pleasant for an Apple user like me.

description: I was one of the very first to put my trust in TrueRanker when they launched, by subscribing to a lifetime plan. I invested thinking I would get lifetime access, as promised. In reality, I only used a small part of my account's functionality (barely 30%). But since last January, TrueRanker has been asking me to pay again to continue accessing my account. This is quite simply a breach of contract and a betrayal of the trust of their first customers. Selling "lifetime" access and then going back on their word is not only dishonest, it also shows a total lack of respect for their users. It's a disgrace. People need to know who TrueRanker really is, and how they treat those who have supported them from the start.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The interface was fairly easy to use, and the rank tracking features seemed promising at first. I am honest.
cons: The biggest issue is dishonesty: I purchased a lifetime plan, yet TrueRanker forced me to pay again to keep my account active. This is misleading and unacceptable.

review_title: An accessible way of tracking ranking and understand position in the SERP
description: This solution is pleasant to use, quite complete while being easy to understand. It is a very good way to know these positions in the SERP of Google.
author: François H.
pros: The interface is clean and easy to use, making it a great tool for customers. The sharing link is a great idea that allows you to share the positions with different people concerned. The analysis of the competitors is also very rich.
cons: The SEO analyzer is pretty poor compare to other tool (but it is not the main feature). I wish we could share competitor and visibility view.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: TrueRanker is great for the price
description: I am very pleased with the purchase
author: izhak A.
pros: - The use of the software is very easy - Daily keyword crawling without incident - New keyword suggestions relevant to the project - Very fast customer service
cons: - Can not see backlinks of my project and competitors - Promotion report with the company logo - Connection to Google Analytics - Does not have the Website Audit feature - Does not have the feature of SEO Checklist
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Scammers: Avoid Truranker, There are Legit Alternatives
description: I am very dissatisfied from this behavior. It's not Truranker but TrueScammers. I paid for 2000 keywords tracking during their Appsumo plan. However, I was able to use 500 keywords only. Now since Google has introduced js crawling update, Truranker showed us their true standard. These people clearly denied to continue LTD plans and asking to switch over to monthly paid plan with 10% penny discount. They cry over email and their platform dashboard. Their title is "It's not us, It's Google" If you are failed to provide the benefits, you simply release the refund to your LTD users.
author: Sumit P.
pros: It used to be a good tool before they start scamming their LTD users. I do not find anything Good with this product.
cons: 1. There's a delete account button: Easy to access, and the [sensitive content hidden] are there waiting for when you make the mistake and click on Delete my account button. Free money for them yeeea. 2. Scammers: I paid for business plan during their Life time deal on Appsumo. Now, they beg for monthly plan and discontinuing LTDs.

description: It helps us track the effectiveness of our company's SEO plan.
author: Tang H.
pros: I like its user interface. Extremely user-friendly and very easy to use. I use it every day.
cons: Perhaps it is a pity that they do not provide additional team users for business plan accounts.

review_title: The tool you need for rank tracking
author: Javier S.
pros: The ease of use and the control, not only of your project, but also of your competition allows you to have a historical view over time for your main keywords. It is undoubtedly one of the most important tools for us and has great value for money.
cons: New intermediate or cheaper plans for small businesses can help to get started with the tool.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great SEO Rank Tracking App at great price
description: Overall I had a great experience with True Ranker and will be using them on daily basis.
author: Rohin D.
pros: The best thing i love about TrueRanker is their GSC addon feature where we can connect our Google GSC account and it can fetch the keywords which we can add to tracking panel with a single click. Its super easy than guess work or brainstorming new keywords. Their Rank tracking is pretty accurate too as what I have seen.
cons: Not really but if they can do a bit more work on their Android app then it will take them to next level for sure.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It's very focus specific and it is very good at what they are doing
cons: You have to have other tools to complement this
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Accurate and easy to use tool
description: TrueRanker helps me to keep my clients' SEO strategy under control. I find out if I have been penalized or if something strange happens thanks to the position tracking. I study the competition and discover new keywords to create content on my clients' websites. Basic tool for anyone who is dedicated to SEO.
author: Optimizza D.
pros: TrueRanker is very easy to use. It has several features to add keywords quickly without having to enter them one by one by hand. In addition, its data is very accurate. Great technical support. They answer in less than 24 hours.
cons: It lacks some functionalities that are in its roadmap.

author: Álex D.
pros: Good ranking tool for SEO projects. I bought it 6 months ago and it is awesome.
cons: The reports tool is limited. I would have more credits to create more reports.

author: Ferran B.
pros: Un gran software para monotorizar keywords.
cons: Ofrece lo que uno demanda. Deseos de futuro? Probablemente funciones para tener más controlada la competencia :P

review_title: TrueRanker, a cheap rank tracker, but with still needs to improve UX and functionalities
description: I have been a TrueRanker user for several months and in that time I have always felt that I was getting a good deal for my money. The platform fulfills its main purpose which is to track the positioning of our keywords. In my opinion it can offer other features that would help us a lot, but as it stands right now it is a good option.
author: Dunia C.
pros: I like that TrueRanker offers good value for money. Rank trackers can be very expensive, but the fact that there are more affordable alternatives helps small agencies. I also like the possibility of sharing a project just by sharing a link.
cons: The platform is very poorly documented. If you have any doubts about how it works, you have no choice but to contact support because they have practically no help content. The UX in general doesn't seem very polished to me, it doesn't feel like a premium product.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A good tool with single USP on Rank Tracking
author: Ashok K.
pros: Trueranker has been developed with an single USP on rank tracking for your site and your competitor. Because of that trueranker is amazing in tracking the rank based on the location, keyword and device.
cons: Compared with the competitors trueranker's USP itself sometimes makes us to feel uncomfortable as we don't have any other SEO functionalities. And the limit are tracked based on the location and device.

description: Been using it for a while and so far I'm loving it, It's a must have tool for marketers who wants to take their social media pages to the next level.
author: Mary Joan S.
pros: Very easy to use and gives it's purpose. Dashboards are straightforward and easy to read.
cons: Still can't figure out how the Visibility Index works.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: easy to use software not complicated
description: i can use this software to investigate my own ranking SEO and compare it to my competitors and learn from my competitors in order to strengthen my own SEO ranking
author: Vincent D.
pros: easy to use, not that complicated. Level for medium technical knowledge is great
cons: For now i have no cons yet because i have not used it for long time
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
